overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a narrow elevated exterior walkway between futuristic skyscrapers in a cyberpunk city at night. The scene features prominent neon lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and dense urban architecture characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow exterior walkway high above the city streets, with a large billboard on the left

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying AVANTE and SI VIS PACEM text with a figure
dark concrete and metal facade of the adjacent high-rise building with structural beams
narrow wet concrete walkway with yellow safety markings and reflective puddles
vehicle headlights and taillights moving along the street far below the walkway
cluster of illuminated windows and neon signs on distant skyscrapers at the end of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow exterior walkway high between futuristic skyscrapers at night. A large illuminated AVANTE billboard dominates the left side while the right side shows a dark building facade. Below, sparse street traffic is visible, and ahead lies a dense cluster of lit skyscrapers creating an enclosed urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway opening to wider city view

events.description: camera passes the AVANTE billboard, revealing more of the right-side building facade and distant holographic displays

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as the left-side billboard passes out of view and the cityscape opens to the right

entered.detail: bright blue holographic advertisements and displays visible in the distance between buildings
rows of warm yellow lit windows on the right-side skyscraper facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the AVANTE billboard, which exits to the left rear. The view opens to reveal illuminated windows on the right-side building and bright blue holographic displays become visible in the distant city center. The walkway continues forward with the street traffic still visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon approaching major intersection

agents.ego_description: proceeding deeper into the urban canyon toward the brightly lit intersection and towering structure ahead

entered.detail: massive illuminated skyscraper with vertical lighting dominating the end of the canyon
busy intersection with multiple lanes of vehicle traffic and bright street lighting

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues deeper between the towering buildings toward a major intersection ahead. The distant holographic displays and traffic lights grow larger and more prominent as the camera approaches. The narrow canyon of skyscrapers creates an enclosed, neon-lit atmosphere with moderate traffic visible on the streets below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow elevated walkway that transitions from a confined corridor into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins high between futuristic skyscrapers, dominated on the left by a large illuminated AVANTE billboard while a dark facade looms to the right. As the camera moves forward, the billboard recedes and the view opens to reveal glowing windows on the right and bright blue holographic displays shimmering in the distant city center. The scene then pushes deeper into the enclosed urban canyon, where the distant holograms and traffic lights grow larger and more prominent. Finally, the perspective advances toward a major intersection, with the dense cluster of skyscrapers framing a vibrant, neon-saturated atmosphere above the street traffic below.
